title: Functions, Parameters, this, and Callable Contracts · Language Lens: Parameter Contracts
summary: Refactor the routing engine into testable transformations, callbacks, methods, and boundary adapters. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js parameter contracts increment in a function-oriented routing toolkit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use defaults, rest parameters, destructuring, and validation without hiding required inputs.
Choose function declarations, expressions, arrows, and methods from hoisting, this, construction, and readability needs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
